limousine_capacity.description: Maximum number of passengers the airport limousine can accommodate on any one trip.

num_reservations.description: Number of reservations made for the trip, serving as the number of Bernoulli trials (n) in the binomial model.

no_show_probability.description: Probability that a person with a reservation does not appear for the trip (30%). The complement (0.70) is the probability of showing up, used as the success probability in the binomial calculation.
